eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Jackson, OR; at 6:48 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 12:48 AM JUL 19, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Jackson County Sheriff's Office has issued a Level 2 BE SET to evacuate for zone JAC-203-B east of northern Antioch Rd, west of E Fork of Dry Creek due to Evans Creek Fire. Monitor local government sources for evacuation and incident updates
